mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee e INNER JOIN users u ON e.employeeId = u.usersId
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee(employeeId, departmentName, departmentFullPath, departmentParentPath, employeeType, employeeRank, employeeName, employeePhone, employeeEmail, employeeStatus, employeeRegistrant, employeeRegistrationDate) VALUES(#{employeeId}, #{departmentName}, #{departmentFullPath}, #{departmentParentPath}, #{employeeType}, #{employeeRank}, #{employeeName}, #{employeePhone}, #{employeeEmail}, #{employeeStatus}, #{employeeRegistrant}, #{employeeRegistrationDate});
mapper.update: UPDATE employee SET employeeType = #{employeeType}, employeeRank = #{employeeRank}, employeeName = #{employeeName}, employeePhone = #{employeePhone}, employeeEmail = #{employeeEmail}, employeeStatus = #{employeeStatus}, departmentName = #{departmentName}, employeeModifier = #{employeeModifier}, employeeModifiedDate = #{employeeModifiedDate} WHERE employeeId = #{employeeId}
UPDATE users SET usersPw = #{usersPw}, usersRole = #{usersRole}, pwdChangeYn = #{pwdChangeYn} WHERE usersId = #{employeeId}
UPDATE users SET usersRole = #{usersRole}, pwdChangeYn = #{pwdChangeYn} WHERE usersId = #{employeeId}
UPDATE employee SET departmentFullPath = #{departmentFullPath}, departmentParentPath = #{departmentParentPath}, departmentName = #{departmentName} WHERE departmentFullPath = #{ordDepartmentFullPath};
UPDATE employee SET departmentFullPath = #{departmentFullPath}, departmentParentPath = #{departmentParentPath}, departmentName = #{departmentName} WHERE employeeId = #{employeeId};
mapper.select: SELECT pwdChangeYn FROM users WHERE usersId = #{usersId};
SELECT usersPw FROM users WHERE usersId = #{usersId};
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET usersPw = #{changePwd}, pwdChangeYn = 'NO' WHERE usersId = #{usersId};
UPDATE employee SET lastLogin = #{lastLogin} WHERE employeeId = #{usersId};
mapper.select: SELECT lastLogin FROM employee WHERE employeeId = #{employeeId};
SELECT usersRole FROM users WHERE usersId = #{usersId};
SELECT departmentName FROM employee WHERE employeeId = #{employeeId};

WITH RankedAlarms AS ( SELECT *, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN userAlarmsState = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY userAlarmsEmployeeId, userAlarmsParameter) > 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS userAlarmsStateN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY userAlarmsEmployeeId, userAlarmsParameter ORDER BY userAlarmsKeyNum DESC) AS rn FROM userAlarms WHERE userAlarmsEmployeeId = #{userAlarmsEmployeeId} ) SELECT * FROM RankedAlarms WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY userAlarmsKeyNum DESC LIMIT 10;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO userAlarms(userAlarmsEmployeeId, userAlarmsTitle, userAlarmsDate, userAlarmsState, userAlarmsURL, userAlarmsParameter, userAlarmsParameterSub, userAlarmsRegistrant, userAlarmsRegistrationDate) VALUES(#{userAlarmsEmployeeId},#{userAlarmsTitle},#{userAlarmsDate},'N',#{userAlarmsURL},#{userAlarmsParameter},#{userAlarmsParameterSub},#{userAlarmsRegistrant},#{userAlarmsRegistrationDate});
mapper.update: UPDATE userAlarms SET userAlarmsState = 'R', userAlarmsModifier = #{userAlarmsModifier}, userAlarmsModifiedDate = #{userAlarmsModifiedDate} WHERE userAlarmsParameter = #{userAlarmsParameter} AND userAlarmsEmployeeId = #{userAlarmsEmployeeId};
mapper.select: SELECT employeeId FROM employee WHERE departmentName = 'QA팀';
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET lastTime = NOW() WHERE usersId = #{usersId};
mapper.select: SELECT lastTime FROM users WHERE usersId = #{usersId};
SELECT * FROM employee WHERE employeeName LIKE '%${keyword}%';
